# configuration

**Instance Property**

A copy of the Safari view controller’s initialized configuration.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying @MainActor var configuration: SFSafariViewController.Configuration { get }
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariViewController/Configuration-swift.class] for configuration properties.

## Configuring the View Controller

- **dismissButtonStyle**: The style of dismiss button to use in the navigation bar to close the Safari view controller.
- **SFSafariViewController.DismissButtonStyle**
- **preferredBarTintColor**: The color to tint the background of the navigation bar and the toolbar.
- **preferredControlTintColor**: The color to tint the control buttons on the navigation bar and the toolbar.
